splits.title: Relief Society Conference

files.notes: This is a single comprehensive article about the Relief Society Conference held October 1-2, 1930. It includes multiple speakers and reports from various stake Relief Societies, but all under the umbrella of the conference proceedings. The content flows continuously from the opening conference description through various speaker presentations to the final remarks, making it one cohesive conference report rather than separate articles.

files.notes: This file contains four distinct lesson sections for February Guide Lessons, covering Theology and Testimony, Work and Business, Literature, and Social Service. Each lesson has clear boundaries with Roman numeral headings and distinct subject matter.
